name: vscode-iris-agentic-dev
description: Wires iris-agentic-dev MCP tools into VS Code Copilot agent mode — automatically picks up your objectscript.conn connection. Requires the iris-agentic-dev binary on PATH or in `iris-agentic-dev.serverPath` setting.

iris-agentic-dev.containerName.description: Name of the Docker container running the IRIS instance. Used to provide the IRIS_CONTAINER environment variable to the iris-agentic-dev server process, which allows it to use tools which require direct access.

iris-agentic-dev.serverPath.description: Full path to the iris-agentic-dev binary. Leave empty to auto-discover via PATH. Use this if VS Code cannot find the binary.

iris-agentic-dev.tlsVerify.description: Verify TLS certificates when connecting to IRIS over HTTPS. Set to false for self-signed certificates. Also disabled automatically when http.proxyStrictSSL is false.

iris-agentic-dev.namespace.description: IRIS namespace override. Leave empty to use the namespace from objectscript.conn. Useful when you want iris-agentic-dev to target a different namespace than your editor connection.

enumDescriptions: Force HTTPS. Use with iris-agentic-dev.tlsVerify: false for self-signed certificates.
iris-agentic-dev.scheme.description: HTTP scheme override for the IRIS web server connection. Leave empty to auto-detect.

enumDescriptions: Standard tool set for ObjectScript development.
Excludes stub/preview tools. Use when you want a stable, production-ready tool set.
Extended tool set including interop production management and container lifecycle tools.
iris-agentic-dev.toolset.description: Controls which iris-dev tools are registered with the MCP server.
